prestazioni: Engine swap to a VW EA113 1.8T 20V (engine code: AUM) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, supporting 300+ HP on E85 fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU tune and 3.5-bar MAP sensor for precise boost control

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Supersprint with a 200-cell catalytic converter and a straight-pipe section post-cat, paired with a Vibrant 1799 resonator for drone cancellation and a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for aggressive tone

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (8-position rebound, 12-position compression damping) and custom-spec progressive-rate springs (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear), paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings for chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny VW Voyage-specific kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and a duckbill rear spoiler) with aggressive 30mm front and 20mm rear overfenders to accommodate 18x9.5 ET15 (front) and 18x10.5 ET20 (rear) BBS RS-GT wheels wrapped in 225/40R18 and 255/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Full OEM+ restomod interior with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (VW-specific mounting brackets), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a custom aluminum shift knob by 034Motorsport for the stock 5-speed manual transmission

Custom front bumper lip by VMR (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) with integrated LED DRLs from LUX H8 Angel Eyes, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon (2-piece, bolt-on) and a set of Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (7-inch, 100W) for auxiliary lighting
